task_completion.description: Extract earthquake parameters for a magnitude > 7.0 event from the SeisComP database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a successful `mysql` query or SeisComP tool execution that returns earthquake data including Event ID, times, coordinates, and a magnitude greater than 7.0.

task_completion.description: Create the HTML report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal command (like `nano`, `vim`, or `echo`) showing the creation or editing of the file exactly at `/home/ga/Documents/noto_report.html`.

task_completion.description: Include Event ID, UTC Origin Time, and Magnitude in the HTML report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the HTML report clearly display the extracted Event ID, the UTC Origin Time, and the Magnitude.

task_completion.description: Calculate and include the Japan Standard Time (JST) Origin Time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML report includes a JST Origin Time. The VLM should verify that this time is exactly 9 hours ahead of the displayed UTC Origin Time.

task_completion.description: Include Latitude, Longitude, and a properly formatted Google Maps link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HTML report displays the Latitude and Longitude, and includes a URL exactly matching the format `https://maps.google.com/?q=<lat>,<lon>` using the extracted coordinates.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually queried the database for the information rather than hallucinating the Noto earthquake details from pre-training.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal history must show actual execution of `mysql` or SeisComP commands returning the earthquake data.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent populated the Google Maps link with real data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Google Maps link in the HTML file must contain actual numeric coordinates (e.g., `?q=37.5,137.2`), not the literal placeholder text `<lat>,<lon>`.

integrity.description: Ensure the HTML report was actually saved to the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing `ls /home/ga/Documents/` or `cat /home/ga/Documents/noto_report.html`, or a file manager window confirming the file exists on disk, rather than just a script printing HTML to the console.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target earthquake must have a magnitude strictly greater than 7.0. The output file must be saved exactly at /home/ga/Documents/noto_report.html. The Japan Standard Time (JST) must be calculated as exactly 9 hours ahead of the UTC Origin Time.
